## Checklist
- [ ] Failing test written first, now passing
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test` green
- [ ] Coverage >= 80%
- [ ] No `console.log` / no secrets / no dead code
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]`
